### Checklist

- [ ] Added entry to `providers.json` with all required fields
- [ ] `get_key_url` links directly to the key creation page (not the homepage)
- [ ] `free_tier` and `pricing_note` reflect current pricing (checked today)
- [ ] `requires_card` is accurate
- [ ] `health_check_url` is a real, low-cost endpoint (or null with explanation)
- [ ] `alternatives` only references slugs that exist in the file
- [ ] Ran `node scripts/validate.js` locally — passes clean
- [ ] I am affiliated with this provider OR have verified all info from their official docs
